title: schoenus selinae
intro: Schoenus selinae, also known as the yellow sedge, is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Schoenus selinae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Schoenus selinae can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
